data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making to reduce user cognitive load.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Optimizes button size and placement for better user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Larger CTA buttons for quicker access.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Groups information into chunks to enhance memorability.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design is consistent with user expectations.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses visual hierarchy and structure to guide users.
data.technical_spec: Clear typographic hierarchy and visual spacing.
